title: Wolf chunk loader
description: Let your wolf or cat do the work - chunk loading made frendly!
body:
Wolf Chunk Loader – A mobile chunk loader in Minecraft Java edition.

Feature: Tame a wolf or cat; it follows you and keeps chunks loaded around it, so your redstone, farms, machines or storage systems stay active when you’re away.
 
Radius 3x3 chunks
 
Easy to tame and use
 
Ideal for automation and resource gathering
 
This mod does not require client installation.
 
Highlight that it’s unique, lore-friendly and perfect for modpacks.
 
if you find some bugs, please write then in comments and I'll be happy to fix them.
note: Version 1.0.0 does not work in singleplayer.
On 2.0.0 does not work entity ticking.
